author: Devi Dyal, Pandit
title: Prashn Aftab, Hissa-i-Awwal
gloss: A book on astrology, Part I.

author: Ganesh Das, Babu
title: Aql ki Machine
notes: 'The Machine of Reason' — Hakim Ram Kishan publishing again (third appearance this quarter).

author: Ganesh Das, Lala
title: Insani zindgi ka Pehla Nazzara
gloss: A book directed against the creation of the world as described in the Bible.
notes: Anti-Genesis polemic from the Arya Steam Press — Arya Samaj rationalist apologetics against missionary cosmology; the registrar records the target as 'the Bible'.

author: Ghulam Dastgir, Munshi
title: Mahsharistan-i-Khayal
gloss: Stray thoughts on moral and religious subjects.

author: Habibullah, Mir, Honorary Magistrate
title: Gulistan-i-Nasaih
gloss: A tract containing certain moral stories translated from the Gulistan and Bostan of Sadi for the use of Muhammadan children.
notes: Sa'di for Muslim children via anjuman free distribution — parallel to the Sikh diaspora's Gurmukhi Bostan (p11 s268): both communities repackaging the same Persian classic this quarter. Author's colonial title (Honorary Magistrate) recorded.

author: Haji Rahm Shahidiya
title: Matam-i-Edward-i-Haftum
gloss: An elegy on the death of His Majesty the late King Edward VII, &c.
notes: Marsiya form applied to Edward VII (d. May 1910) — imperial mourning in the Urdu elegiac tradition; loyalism data point.

flags.issue: margin serial obscured by pencil X; read as 158 (between 157 and 159)

author: Imam Jafar Sadiq
title: Falnama Quran Sharif
gloss: A booklet on the method of taking omens from the Kuran, translated into Urdu from a Persian original by M. Miran Bakhsh.
notes: Bibliomancy manual attributed to Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq — authorship column carries the sixth Imam as 'author'; Persian → Urdu translation chain.

author: Jagat Singh, Master
title: Kheti ki Pahli Kitab
gloss: The First Book of Agriculture, in the form of questions and answers.
notes: '(Designed for educational purposes.)' printed above entry. Agriculture catechism for schools, part 1 (s161 is part 2).

author: Jagat Singh, Master
title: Kheti ki Dusri Kitab
notes: Author dash-continuation of s160. '(Designed for educational purposes)' printed above entry.
